text.title: PII Scrubbing Recipe Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from traffic sample to validated pii-scrub-spec artefact.

step.name: sample-and-classify
step.action: Classify each row's PII density (none / low / high) using regex hit count.
step.decision-gate: if >30% rows classified `high` → scrub mode must include ML detector

step.name: pick-scrub-strategy
step.action: Choose `regex_only` (low density + structured formats) or `regex_plus_ml` (mixed) or `ml_plus_human_review` (free-form / regulated).

step.name: bind-consent
step.input: consent dictionary path + consent flag field name
step.action: Pin `consent_label_field`. Drop rows where flag missing.
step.decision-gate: any row entering eval set must have consent flag = true

step.name: set-retention
step.action: Pick `retention_days` matching the strictest applicable class.
